payload.title: Antioxidant, antiaging and mitochondrial protective effects of JadeAging in Caenorhabditis elegans.
payload.abstract_excerpt: Objective This study aims to evaluate the antioxidant, anti-aging, and mitochondrial protective effects of JadeAging, a Chinese medicine-based longevity formulation, using the model organism Caenorhabditis elegans . Methods We used C. elegans to assess the impact of JadeAging and its individual components (rehmannia, poria, and ginseng) on various health metrics. RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) was performed to identify differentially expressed genes and their effects on biological pathways. Lifespan and healthspan assays were performed to evaluate cell vitality, whereas mitochondrial health was assessed using mitochondrial fragmentation analysis. Antioxidant capacity was determined by measuring protection against reactive oxygen species. Results Treatment with JadeAging did not significantly extend lifespan but showed improvements in healthspaâ€¦
